title: Calyptrogenia riedeliana

The species is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of the continent. It is a member of the order Sapindales, which includes other flowering plants like the lychee and the rambutan. Calyptrogenia riedeliana is further classified into the genus Calyptrogenia, a monotypic genus consisting of only one species. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Sapindaceae family.
